title: crotalaria dewildemaniana subsp. dewildemaniana
intro: Crotalaria dewildemaniana subsp. dewildemaniana is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African medicine, where it has been used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been reported to have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it beneficial for treating wounds, skin infections, and other health issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or ointments to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
